# Vendored assets

## Sortable.min.js

- Package: `sortablejs`
- Version: **1.15.6** (pinned)
- License: MIT
- Source: https://github.com/SortableJS/Sortable (npm tarball: `npm pack sortablejs@1.15.6`, file `package/Sortable.min.js`, unmodified)

UMD build — loaded via a deferred classic `<script>` tag before `editor.js`
(which uses the `window.Sortable` global). To update: bump the version here,
re-run `npm pack sortablejs@<version>` and copy `Sortable.min.js` verbatim.
